sections.paragraph:
suff. זַרְחֵךְ m.-

(1) a rising of light, Isa 60:3.

(2) [Zerah, Zarah], pr.n.-(a) of a son of Judah, by Tamar his daughter-in-law, Gen 38:30 Num 26:20.-(b) of a son of Reuel, Gen 36:13, 17 Gen 36:17.-(c) m. Num 26:13, in other places called זֹחֵר.-(d) 1Ch 6:6, 26 1Ch 6:26.-(e) [“A king or leader of the Ethiopians, who invaded Judah in the reign of Asa”], 2Ch 14:8. Gr. Ζαρά.
